misc: Loves basketball even more than Marcus, making some fans wonder if he's a real golfer
biography: Hailing from Vuosaari Golf Helsinki, Pasi has carved out a notable presence in the Hector Trophée, having participated in four previous editions of this unique pair competition. Known affectionately to many as 'Susi-Pasi', his involvement has consistently added a distinctive element to the tournament's competitive tapestry.

Among his achievements, Pasi has secured the coveted Hector Trophée for the winning pair on one occasion, showcasing his formidable capabilities in the team format. While this triumph highlights his collaborative strengths, the individual Victor Trophy, signifying the top individual performance, remains an accolade he has yet to capture.

Pasi is recognized for his profound enthusiasm for basketball, a passion so intense that it occasionally prompts light-hearted inquiry among observers as to where his true sporting allegiance lies, perhaps even surpassing the dedication of his peer, Marcus. Although Pasi will not be among the competitors for the Hector Trophée 2026, his continued active engagement in Hector events suggests that a future return to the fairways remains a distinct possibility, allowing him to pursue further golf accolades with his characteristic competitive drive.
